name: locker.weather_wait
description: Launch a harness-owned Sandy Creek locker baseline from the captured locker-ready save fixture, force a cold locker probe state through the debug menu, then wait for a real camp-locker packet.

steps.label: wait_for_gameplay_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: Sandy Creek locker-ready gameplay is loaded before forcing the cold locker probe state; this is startup/load footing only.

steps.label: force_cold_temperature
steps.expected_visible_fact: Debug force-temperature returns to the live map after setting the probe state to 35F.

steps.label: wait_for_locker_service
steps.expected_visible_fact: A bounded turn window completes on the locker-ready fixture; practical gear proof depends on same-run camp locker queued/plan/after/serviced artifact lines.
